notes: v1.14.47 - globe network matched to the phantom-globe prototype ('make it look just like that'). FOOTPRINT: HUBS rebuilt from 15 -> the prototype's exact 21 NA/EU sites (Austin kept at idx 0 = home/warp target): NJ, Lancaster, Chester VA, Winston-Salem, Atlanta, Columbus GA, Chicago, Indianapolis, South Bend, Roseville/Detroit, Plano, Muskogee, Ellendale, Colorado Springs, Las Vegas, Hillsboro, Cambridge ON, London, Barcelona, Falun. TOPOLOGY: ARCS changed from the 18-arc Austin-star to the prototype's 14-arc regional MESH (NJ/Chicago east-coast spine, two trans-Atlantic spans NJ->London/Barcelona, a London->Falun European link, Muskogee->Chicago, and AUS-01's four 'live' home spurs). Sites with no arc (Lancaster, Chester, Columbus, Indy, South Bend, Detroit, Ellendale, Colo Springs) render as lone beacons, exactly as the prototype. STYLING: arcs touching AUS-01 (idx 0) are 'live' = warm gold + brighter/thicker (1.7 vs 1.25, [0.62,0.46,0.16] vs the dim cyan [0.21,0.36,0.46]); fiber packets split gold (PKT_GOLD, faster 0.34 + bigger 3.8) on home spurs vs cyan (PKT_CYAN, 0.20 + 2.6) on the mesh, replacing the uniform white packets. AUS-01 beacon -> GOLD [1.0,0.80,0.34] (others stay cyan), plus a NEW soft expanding gold HALO point at Austin (cloud-path aPhase -2.0 => soft edge/no twinkle, front-gated so it hides when Austin faces away; 3.2s expand+fade cycle, size 8->42, frozen as a steady dot under reduced-motion). RE-ADD: the 3 real CoreWeave sites the prototype omits were added back at John's request (West TX/Project Horizon idx 21, Reno NV idx 22, Glasgow/DataVita idx 23), each joined to its nearest hub by a CYAN integrator arc (West TX->Plano, Reno->Las Vegas, Glasgow->London) so they read as mesh, not orphan dots, and the prototype's 4 gold home spurs stay the only gold. Final footprint = 24 hubs / 17 arcs. Dynamic buffer auto-sizes from HUBS.length/ARCS.length => dynCount = 24 hubs + 34 packets (17 arcs x PPA 2) + 6 lightning + 1 halo = 65 slots (exact, verified). NOT touched: WebGL terrain/night-Earth texture, warp pipeline, ENTER_ENABLED (still false), hold-to-enter ring, all CSS (this ship is JS-only => CSS brace baseline unchanged). Gates: node --check all 3 inline scripts PASS, three stamps lockstep v1.14.47, sw cache bumped, surgical diff (70/27, one file), dct/sw CRLF + version.json LF. DEVICE-CHECK (John, iPhone, full close+reopen to clear SW cache): confirm gold AUS-01 spurs + halo, cyan regional mesh, gold/cyan packet split; tune arc/packet/halo brightness + halo size from device.
